steps.title: Notice the emotional meaning
steps.content: The underlined sentence shifts from the practical use of fires for heat to their symbolic meaning. Fires represent being home, drawing a protective circle, and feeling safe through the night.

steps.title: Choose comfort beyond warmth
steps.content: B is too limited because the line does more than summarize earlier facts. C says the house remains cold, and D says comfort exists with or without fire; neither is supported. The line shows emotional comfort beyond physical warmth. The answer is A.
